info.description: REST API untuk aplikasi keuangan Finvera - Personal Finance Manager
info.title: Finvera API

get.description: Get all accounts for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new account for the authenticated user

get.description: Get account details by account ID
Get all default and custom categories for the user

post.description: Create a new custom category for the authenticated user

get.description: Get category details by category ID
Get all scheduled transactions for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new scheduled transaction for the authenticated user

get.description: Get scheduled transaction details by ID
Get all tags for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new tag for the authenticated user

get.description: Get tag details by tag ID
Get all transactions for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new transaction and update account balances accordingly

get.description: Get transaction details by transaction ID

put.description: Update transaction details and adjust account balances accordingly

delete.description: Delete a transaction and revert its effect on account balances

post.description: Autentikasi user dan mendapatkan JWT token
Membuat akun user baru dengan username, email, dan password

BearerAuth.description: Masukkan token JWT dengan format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
